title-group.article-title: Retracted: MEPE/OF45 protects cells from DNA damage induced killing via stabilizing CHK1

related-article.article-title: Retraction of ‘MEPE/OF45 protects cells from DNA damage induced killing via stabilizing CHK1’

body.p: This article has been retracted. Please see: https://doi.org/10.1093/nar/gkac211

caption.p: Click here for additional data file.
